mapper.select: SELECT e.departmentId AS departmentId, COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS employeeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status IN (0, 1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS attendanceDays, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lateCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS earlyCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leaveDays, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absentDays, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.status = 1 THEN a.employeeId END) AS lateEmployeeCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.status = 4 THEN a.employeeId END) AS leaveEmployeeCount FROM attendance a INNER JOIN employee e ON a.employeeId = e.id WHERE a.attendanceDate >= #{startDate} AND a.attendanceDate <= #{endDate} AND e.isDeleted = 0 AND e.departmentId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY e.departmentId
